headline: Workday Expands HCM Reach With Lyra Partnership And Insperity HRScale Launch
summary: Workday partnered with Lyra Health, selecting it as the preferred mental health partner for integration into the Workday Wellness platform. The company and Insperity launched the Insperity HRScale solution, a joint HR platform for small and midsized businesses, now generally available. Both partnerships are aimed at expanding Workday’s product ecosystem and deepening integration within its Human Capital Management suite. Workday, listed as NasdaqGS:WDAY, is rolling out these partnerships...

headline: How Workday (WDAY) Story Is Shifting As AI Spend Rises And Growth Expectations Reset
summary: Workday’s fair value estimate in the updated model moved from US$231.17 to US$184.73, a cut of about 20% that resets expectations around the stock. This shift lines up with more cautious Street commentary after Q4 results, CEO changes and reduced long term targets, even as some analysts still point to AI, finance and HR automation as longer term positives. In the sections that follow, you will see what is driving this evolving narrative and how to keep track of it as new information comes...

headline: Kognitiv and Syndio Partner to Support EU Pay Transparency Directive Compliance Across Global Enterprises
summary: SEATTLE & NEWTON, Mass., March 11, 2026--Syndio, the leader in AI for Pay Decisions, and Kognitiv, a leading global consulting firm and trusted Workday services partner, today announced a strategic partnership to help global enterprises prepare for the EU Pay Transparency Directive (EUPTD) and the growing wave of global pay transparency regulations. The partnership combines Syndio’s AI-powered platform for governing pay decisions with Kognitiv’s global advisory and implementation expertise. Toge
